texto: Your function as a critic is to show that it is really you yourself who should have written the book, if you had had the time, and since you hadn't you are glad that someone else had, although obviously it might have been done better.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Stephen Potter sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Your function as a critic is to show that it is really you yourself who should have written the b…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, books, criticism, útil em momentos de criticism e humor.
